title: pyrus cydonia subsp. oblonga
intro: Pyrus cydonia subsp. oblonga is a species of quince, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of southern Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pyrus cydonia subsp. oblonga include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant is often used to prepare jams, jellies, and other herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
